title: State Monad Counter
code:
import Control.Monad.State

type Counter = State Int

increment :: Counter ()
increment = modify (+1)

decrement :: Counter ()
decrement = modify (subtract 1)

getCount :: Counter Int
getCount = get

program :: Counter Int
program = increment >> increment >> increment >> decrement >> getCount

main :: IO ()
main = print (evalState program 0)
description: Threads mutable state through pure functions using the `State` monad. `modify`, `get`, and `>>` compose stateful operations without any `IORef` or side effects. The final `evalState` runs the computation from an initial value.
